zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice FitzAlan於大約1350年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel45歲，母親Eleanor of Lancaster33歲。她於1369年與Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1415年3月17日在她的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾包恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice FitzAlan于大约1350年出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel45岁，母亲Eleanor of Lancaster33岁。她于1369年与Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1415年3月17日在她的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾包恩。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice FitzAlan was born about 1350, in Arundel, Sussex, England, her father, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, was 45 and her mother, Eleanor of Lancaster, was 33. She married Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent in 1369, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 17 March 1415, in her hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice FitzAlan est née environ 1350, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Eleanor of Lancaster, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent en 1369, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 mars 1415, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Bourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice FitzAlan um 1350 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel 45 und ihre Mutter Eleanor of Lancaster 33. Sie hat 1369 in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. März 1415 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzAlan è nata il circa 1350 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Eleanor of Lancaster, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent nel 1369, nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 17 marzo 1415, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice FitzAlanが約1350年にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundelは45歳，母Eleanor of Lancasterは33歳であった。1369年にイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルでThomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1415年3月17日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice FitzAlan(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor of Lancaster(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1369년 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1415년 3월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 본에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice FitzAlan nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor of Lancaster, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent em 1369, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de março de 1415, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice FitzAlan родилась около 1350 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor of Lancaster, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent в 1369 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 17 марта 1415 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности бурн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice FitzAlan nació aproximadamente 1350, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Eleanor of Lancaster, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent en 1369, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1415, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
